installation_requirements.base_footprint: 30 in wide x 24 in, constructed from 3/4 in thick plate

specifications.synchronization: Patented hydraulic synchronization - overhead or in-floor stainless steel lines

features: Twin cylinder direct drive - no chains or cables
Large 4-inch cylinders for longer seal life and lower operating pressures
Precision steel ball bearing roller carriages
Low-profile 5-inch swing arms fit under most passenger cars
Overhead or in-floor stainless steel hydraulic lines
All-position mechanical safety locks in both columns

optional_equipment.description: Alternative to overhead routing, available on TP-16
Longer custom adapters available upon request

certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: All-position 1-inch thick mechanical locks on both carriages
Locks engage from ground to full lifting height of 6 feet
Automatic swing arm restraints engage when lifting begins
Restraints release only when vehicle is safely lowered
notes: Warranty: 25 years structural, 10 year mechanical, limited lifetime hydraulic cylinder
Combined manual covers LMF-12, TP-16, and TP-18 models
Standard version without airlocks - see separate manual for airlock version
PDF stored as Git LFS pointer - actual binary content unavailable at extraction time
